input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.9.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.9.6
            TITLE: the main hoop braces must be straight, without any bends.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.9.6: The Main Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends.
F.5.9.6 The Main Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 35 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The Main Hoop Braces must be straight, without any bends.
